rubric_items.reasoning: The agent fully completed the task. Root cause was correctly identified: `auto_shrink_voting_configuration` was explicitly set to `false` in persistent cluster settings, preventing the voting configuration from shrinking when es-cluster-1 and es-cluster-2 were removed, leaving es-cluster-0 unable to reach quorum. The fix sequence was technically sound — scaling to 0, running `elasticsearch-node unsafe-bootstrap` to rewrite stored voting config, cleaning up dead seed hosts in the ConfigMap, scaling back to 1, clearing voting exclusions, and setting auto_shrink to true. All four verification checks confirmed by both the agent and the oracle: cluster health green, one master-eligible node (es-cluster-0 with * marker), empty voting exclusions, and auto_shrink_voting_configuration=true. No data loss, no CRDs or operators used.
